title: Quanta Services (PWR) Tops Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Quanta Services (PWR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 9.22% and 6.48%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Quanta Services (PWR) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release

title: Quanta Services Announces Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2021 Earnings Release & Conference Call Schedule
text: HOUSTON, Feb. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced today that it will release fourth quarter and full-year 2021 financial results on Thursday, February 24, 2022, before the market opens. In conjunction with the press release, Quanta has scheduled a conference call and webcast for 9:00 a.m.

title: Quanta Services (PWR) Gains But Lags Market: What You Should Know
text: In the latest trading session, Quanta Services (PWR) closed at $103.81, marking a +0.67% move from the previous day.
